properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret in Base64 format. Required in environment.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.admin.email
properties.description: Bootstrap administrator account email. Required in environment.

properties.name: app.admin.password
properties.description: Bootstrap administrator account password. Required in environment.

properties.name: app.admin.first-name
properties.description: Bootstrap administrator first name. Required in environment.

properties.name: app.admin.last-name
properties.description: Bootstrap administrator last name. Required in environment.
